Character_The_Narrator.description: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing.
Character_The_Narrator.voice_profile: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.
Character_The_Narrator.visual_lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye.
Character_The_Narrator.performance_notes: In bare-room frames, speaks to camera/implied listener with careful composure that frays; in bedchamber action, plays opposite the Old Man and officers without breaking confessional V.O. continuity.

Character_The_Old_Man.description: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair, deeply lined pale face; one pale blue eye with a dull filmy veil, the other eye ordinary; wears a plain white period nightshirt.
Character_The_Old_Man.voice_profile: Elderly male; thin, reedy, low energy; short startled phrases; weak breath support; same fragile voice in the single spoken line and any murmur.
Character_The_Old_Man.visual_lock: Always elderly, white-haired, frail; signature constant is the single pale blue eye with dull filmy veil that must not drift to clear blue or to the Narrator's face; nightshirt is his default on-screen garment.
Character_The_Old_Man.performance_notes: Looks toward door, darkness, or Narrator—not the audience; terror is inward and listening, not presentational.

Character_Officer_Reynolds.description: Man in early 40s, solid medium build, square jaw, short neat brown hair with a straight side part, clean-shaven, steady brown eyes, lightly weathered skin.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.voice_profile: Male, early 40s; medium-low pitch; even civil pace; polite official energy without menace; same measured voice throughout the search.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.visual_lock: Only officer with square jaw and clean-shaven brown-haired look in early 40s; face must stay distinct from Hale's mustache and Briggs's younger smoother face; shared uniform via wardrobe_lock only.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.performance_notes: Addresses Narrator and fellow officers; professional courtesy, not camera address.
